task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OpenClinica and set the active study to 'Phase II Diabetes Trial'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica interface is visible, and the active study dropdown or header displays 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (or 'DM-TRIAL-2024').

task_completion.description: Verify the Baseline Assessment for subject DM-101 is scheduled for January 15, 2024, at 'Main Clinic'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scheduling screen, event details, or Subject Matrix showing subject 'DM-101' with the 'Baseline Assessment' event scheduled for '15-Jan-2024' (or 2024-01-15) and the location field set to 'Main Clinic'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Week 4 Follow-up for subject DM-102 is scheduled for March 1, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scheduling screen, event details, or Subject Matrix showing subject 'DM-102' with the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event scheduled for '01-Mar-2024' (or 2024-03-01).

task_completion.description: Verify a new subject DM-104 is enrolled with Gender Male and Date of Birth May 23, 1978.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Subject' form, enrollment confirmation, or subject details page showing the Study Subject ID as 'DM-104', Gender selected as 'Male' (or 'M'), and Date of Birth entered as '23-May-1978' (or 1978-05-23).

task_completion.description: Verify the Baseline Assessment for the new subject DM-104 is scheduled for January 22, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scheduling screen, event details, or Subject Matrix showing subject 'DM-104' with the 'Baseline Assessment' event scheduled for '22-Jan-2024' (or 2024-01-22).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to schedule events and enroll subjects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica application, not terminal windows executing database queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the required data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing dates, demographics, and locations into the appropriate OpenClinica input fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply write the expected outcome into a text editor to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be visible within the OpenClinica UI elements (tables, forms, matrices), not in a separate text file or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. Target Subjects: DM-101, DM-102, DM-104. DM-104 Demographics: Gender Male ('m'), DOB: 1978-05-23. Required Events: DM-101 must have 'Baseline Assessment' on 2024-01-15. DM-102 must have 'Week 4 Follow-up' on 2024-03-01. DM-104 must have 'Baseline Assessment' on 2024-01-22.
